name: Aldridge & Charles Marine
description: A captain-owned yachting firm based in South Florida. We handle yacht brokerage, management and detailing, refit and engineering, charter, and crew placement for owners along the Atlantic coast and across the Caribbean.

capabilities.name: browse-articles
capabilities.description: Read published articles and guides on yacht buying, selling, management, and crew placement.

capabilities.name: browse-yachts-for-sale
capabilities.description: Read currently listed motor and sailing yachts for sale across South Florida and the Caribbean.

capabilities.name: submit-inquiry
capabilities.description: Submit a written inquiry about a vessel, service, or general matter. We reply personally.

authentication.notes: Public site. The /api/admin/* surface requires session cookie issued by /api/admin/login and is not intended for agent traffic.
